entry.title: What is the future for SAP Crystal Reports Server 2020?
entry.content:
We are a heavy user of Crystal Reports Server 2016 and Crystal Reports Server 2020.  Lately, we have been considering upgrading our remaining Crystal Reports Server 2016 instances to Crystal Reports Server 2020, based on the 2024 EOL dates for Crystal Reports Server 2020.  However, the EOL dates for Crystal Reports Server 2020 only get us a few more years.  Does SAP plan a new release of Crystal Reports Server, or is this the end of the roadmap for this product?

Thank you in advance for your time in answering this question.

entry.title: Can we set CFL fields to display only in standard fiori app ?
entry.content: Hi All, we have few custom fields added in Manage Billing Document. Is there a way we can set these field to display only when user is editing other standard field?

entry.title: Re: Using OData 'search' parameter with an Input field search
entry.content: It works, thanks!

entry.title: Re: More entries - in More Search Help dropdown list
entry.content: Mr.Rao, Question is 'IF we want to ADD more customer specific entries'

entry.title: Re: Questions re: "Multi-model with SAP HANA Cloud" developer challenge
entry.content: found an issue, it's due to myDevChallenger ID. however, I tried to store the credentials, its stating authentication failed .

entry.title: Local codelist lookups in MAGs
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am doing a mapping in MAG and I have got a requirement to perform local codelist lookup by writing the logic in XSLT. I have created the required codelist in source MIG and assigned to the leaf nodes. Just wanted to know if there is any function available in XSLT that can be used to write codelist lookup logic?

If available please share a sample code snippet of the same.

entry.title: Re: Conversion of Credit Management to SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi All

QQ, On the Preparatory Activity and Migration of Customizing for Credit Management -- Define Settings for Credit Management Migration we have just one Rule for migration, what happened if we have more than 1 rule? how can we migrate customers to BP Credit role with correct rules if we can only select one on the prep steps.

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration – Sending email from Microsoft 365 to SAP Backend in private network using SA
entry.content:
Hello!

We are trying to get e-mails from a customer service e-mail box (outlook 365) into SAP S/4 Customer Management. The idea was to use ERMS with SAP Connect. Is it possible? or now we need to use CPI + BTP cloud connector? And, in this case, is the ERMS no longer needed? We need the original email sender to identify the business partner and generate a service request routed to a particular service group.

Thanks and regards!

Marisa

entry.title: Re: QM10/QM11/QM12 No filter can be set after upgrade on...
entry.content: Is this specific to these transactions or in all ALV lists?

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022: My Experience
entry.content:
Nice blog @Mamikee 👍

I suppose Intel MacBooks will still be around for quite a few years - for example I will keep running my old one until Apple stops releasing security patches for it, so it's worthwhile having a blog like yours which is easier to follow than the official advice.

For Intel MacBook users who want to try a different container management toolset (Podman Desktop), or who like to run Linux VMs as the base for the Cloud Developer Trial, then there is also a blog I wrote for Intel MacBooks that covers those two cases: https://community.sap.com/t5/devops-and-system-administration-blogs/using-podman-for-abap-platform-trial-container-on-ubuntu-server-and-on/ba-p/13573945 

(Well, my blogs were written for Abap Platform Trial, which is the predecessor of Cloud Developer Trial, but people can easily enough switch the commands to suit).

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration: Manually Sign / Verify XML payload based on XML Signature Standard
entry.content: Tried it and loved it 😊

entry.title: Re: Is there any way to track or audit changes on who had...
entry.content:
What do you mean by "deleted the form"? Do you mean who withdrew or cancelled it? That information is stored in the "processes" table (name escapes me at the moment).....which has the status of all processes (even "withdrawn" as well as the ID of the person, date, and time of "change".

But curious of the need to audit this as it is pretty much auditing something that was never done....ie, a process that was never completed.

entry.title: Re: Assign Fiori processes to the user HCMFAB_STARTPROCES...
entry.content:
You must make sure that.....

1. you have the "user parameter" assigned to your user id which tells it which "browser context(s)" (and possible "process group(s)") are assigned to you as the processes shown depend on "browser context" assigned.

2. make sure your processes are assigned to an initiator role (which is directly associated as well to the "browser contect"). For example, HRASRA, HRASRB, HRASRD, etc.

3. make sure your "browser context" config was completed....there is a particular "view" for this you can maintain, but keep in mind, it is client dependent.

Thats just off the top of my head of things to check first.

entry.title: Re: SAP MaxDB Content Server Migration with Minimized Downtime for Large Size DB
entry.content: Is the last log backup really necessary? Or would it be enough to use one last incremental backup of the MaxDB created during the planned downtime?

entry.title: Re: Subscription Failed: SAP CAP Multitenant application.
entry.content:
Hi @jreimann,

{
    "name": "vendortracker",
    "version": "1.0.0",
    "description": "A simple CAP project.",
    "type": "commonjs",
    "repository": "<Add your repository here>",
    "license": "UNLICENSED",
    "private": true,
    "dependencies": {
        "@sap-cloud-sdk/connectivity": "^3.9.0",
        "@sap-cloud-sdk/core": "^1.54.2",
        "@sap-cloud-sdk/http-client": "^3.5.0",
        "@sap-cloud-sdk/mail-client": "^3.9.0",
        "@sap-cloud-sdk/resilience": "^3.4.0",
        "@sap/approuter": "^16.2.1",
        "@sap/cds": "^7",
        "@sap/cds-hana": "^2",
        "@sap/hdi-deploy": "^4.8.0",
        "@sap/xssec": "^3.6.0",
        "axios": "^1.4.0",
        "cors": "^2.8.5",
        "express": "^4.18.2",
        "form-data": "^4.0.0",
        "hdb": "^0.19.6",
        "moment": "^2.29.4",
        "passport": "^0.6.0",
        "util": "^0.12.5",
        "uuid": "^9.0.1",
        "uuid-random": "^1.3.2"
    },
    "devDependencies": {
        "@cap-js/sqlite": "^1.2.1",
        "@sap/cds-dk": "^7.2.0",
        "@sap/ux-specification": "UI5-1.116",
        "@types/uuid": "^9.0.4",
        "@ui5/cli": "^3.9.2",
        "rimraf": "^3.0.2"
    },
    "scripts": {
        "start": "cds-serve",
        "watch-configapp": "cds watch --open configapp/webapp/index.html?sap-ui-xx-viewCache=false",
        "undeploy": "cf undeploy vendortracker --delete-services --delete-service-keys --delete-service-brokers",
        "build": "rimraf resources mta_archives && mbt build --mtar archive",
        "deploy": "cf deploy mta_archives/vendortracker_1.0.0.mtar --retries 1",
        "watch-certificateapp": "cds watch --open certificateapp/webapp/index.html?sap-ui-xx-viewCache=false",
        "watch-configurationapp": "cds watch --open configurationapp/webapp/index.html?sap-ui-xx-viewCache=false",
        "watch-project1": "cds watch --open project1/webapp/index.html?sap-ui-xx-viewCache=false"
    },
    "sapux": [
        "app/configurationapp",
        "app/project1"
    ],
    "cds": {
        "features": {
            "csrf": true,
            "csrfInBatch": true
        },
        "build": {
            "tasks": [
                {
                    "for": "hana",
                    "dest": "../db"
                },
                {
                    "for": "node-cf"
                }
            ]
        },
        "requires": {
            "db": {
                "kind": "hana",
                "credentials": {
                    "database": "vendortracker-hdivendortracker"
                }
            },
            "auth": "xsuaa",
            "mailService": {
                "kind": "rest",
                "credentials": {
                    "destination": "mail_destination",
                    "forwardAuthToken": true
                },
                "csrf": true
            }
          
        }
    }
}

entry.title: Re: Subscription Failed: SAP CAP Multitenant application.
entry.content:
vendortracker > app > xs.app.json

{
    "welcomeFile": "/app/index.html",
    "authenticationMethod": "route",
    "logout": {
        "logoutEndpoint": "/app-logout",
        "logoutPage": "/"
    },
    "routes": [
        {
            "source": "^/app/(.*)$",
            "target": "$1",
            "localDir": ".",
            "cacheControl": "no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate",
            "authenticationType": "xsuaa"
        },
        {
            "source": "^/appconfig/",
            "localDir": ".",
            "cacheControl": "no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate"
        },
        {
            "source": "^/user-api(.*)",
            "target": "$1",
            "service": "sap-approuter-userapi"
        },
        {
            "source": "^/sms-api/(.*)$",
            "target": "$1",
            "destination": "sms-api",
            "csrfProtection": false,
            "authenticationType": "none"
        },
        {
            "source": "^/(.*)$",
            "target": "$1",
            "destination": "srv-api",
            "csrfProtection": false,
            "authenticationType": "xsuaa"
        }
    ]
}

entry.title: Re: Subscription Failed: SAP CAP Multitenant application.
entry.content:
vendortracker > app > package.json

{
  "name": "approuter",
  "dependencies": {
    "@sap/approuter": "^14.0.0"
  },
  "engines": {
    "node": "^18.0.0"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "start": "node node_modules/@sap/approuter/approuter.js"
  }
}

entry.title: Change of email address or phoneNumber is triggering webhook without new email/phoneNumber
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have webhook configured for accountUpdated event. So, when we change email address after code verification it calls "account.otp.update" API. As mentioned in documentation, it triggers the accountUpdated event but the payload does not have changed email address or phone number.

Is there any way to add changed/new email/phoneNumber to payload?

Thanks

Rohit

entry.content:
Hi Vitality!

Here is my week 1 submission!

entry.title: Help Needed: Error with Call Transaction in BDC (ABAP Program CL_BUPA_RESULT_SUB_SCREEN_ALV=CP)
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm currently working on creating a Batch Data Communication (BDC) in SAP. However, I'm encountering a problem during debugging. Whenever the program executes the CALL TRANSACTION, it crashes and generates the following error dump:

Dump generated in ABAP Program CL_BUPA_RESULT_SUB_SCREEN_ALV=CP by a batch input to the T-code BP

Has anyone experienced a similar issue or have any insights into what might be causing this error? I've tried checking for typical issues like screen sequences and authorization problems, but nothing seems to stand out. Any help or pointers would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 1 - Setup
entry.content:
Hi John. I see you pasted all the separate Python statements into a single IPython execution.

Was it on purpose? 🤓

entry.title: Re: Questions re: "Multi-model with SAP HANA Cloud" developer challenge
entry.content:
Can you please check the message of this correlation id the way I described in: https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/questions-re-quot-multi-model-with-sap-hana-cloud-quot-developer-challenge/m-p/13724192/highlight/true#M2028387

?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Questions re: "Multi-model with SAP HANA Cloud" developer challenge
entry.content: This should be the password of the DBAdmin administrator user, which you specified while creating the HANA db instance in point 3 of the step "Choose your license, instance name, and password": https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/hana-cloud-mission-trial-3.html#03f5ea2e-c7d4-4666-90ee-9f46df602c1b

entry.title: SAC Data Action - Date Copy - model at Day granularity
entry.content:
Dear Community

I m currently working on a data model with a Day Granularity and i was wondering if there was a simple way to copy Actual Data ( at day granularity) to my planning version

In the data action i would like to set up a Year Reference and then automatically the data action will copy these data to the Target year

I currently facing some difficulties because idealy i would like to mention only the year as a reference and as target

Does someone has a nice solution ?

For exemple this kind of script is working where %Annee_reference% is in fact a day but i do not find a smart way to mention the target year 

Best regards 

Julien


IF [d/Date].[p/YEAR]="2025" AND YEAR(%Annee_Reference%)=2025 THEN
DATA()=RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version]="public.Actual")
ENDIF

IF [d/Date].[p/YEAR]="2025" AND YEAR(%Annee_Reference%)=2026 THEN
DATA()=RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version]="public.Actual",[d/Date]=NEXT(1,"YEAR",[d/Date]))
ENDIF

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Code: Java support
entry.content:
According to the roadmap, it is planned for Q3 2024.

https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?PRODUCT=73555000100800004515&q=java&range=CURRENT-LAST#;INNO=D5DC47561FA21EDEB58FCC2E2488A770

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Code: Java support

entry.title: MII ADS Printing HA Windows Cluster issue
entry.content:
We have a strange Problem where we implemented MII ADS Printing on HA Windows clusters. The Overall Printing works fine and everything works as expected , however after every Failover the Printing fails unless we reboot the Node. And in the logs we see the following error , anyone faced this kind of issue ? we already compared the permissions/security on the file and drive. 

 

Caused by: com.sap.tc.adobe.pdfobject.base.core.PDFObjectRuntimeException: Processing exception during a "Render" operation.
Request start time: Wed Jun 05 20:58:03 UTC 2024
com.adobe.ProcessingException: com.adobe.ads.security.IllegalFileAccessException: <Render><Output><XDC> error: access to G:\\usr\\sap\\NQ1\\SYS\\global\\AdobeDocumentServices\\lib\\zpl203-POC.xdc is not allowed
 
Exception Stack Trace:
com.adobe.ProcessingException: com.adobe.ads.security.IllegalFileAccessException: <Render><Output><XDC> error: access to G:\\usr\\sap\\NQ1\\SYS\\global\\AdobeDocumentServices\\lib\\zpl203-POC.xdc is not allowed
at com.adobe.ads.request.ADSRequest.processOperations(Unknown Source)
at com.adobe.ads.request.ADSRequest.process(Unknown Source)
at com.adobe.AdobeDocumentServicesEJB.processRequest(Unknown Source)
at com.adobe.AdobeDocumentServicesEJB.rpData(Unknown Source)
at com.adobe.AdobeDocumentServicesEJB.rpData(Unknown Source)
at sun.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke0(Native Method)
at sun.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(NativeMethodAccessorImpl.java:62)
at sun.reflect.DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.java:43)
at java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:497)
at com.sap.engine.services.ejb3.runtime.impl.RequestInvocationContext.proceedFinal(RequestInvocationContext.java:47)

Caused by: com.adobe.ads.security.IllegalFileAccessException: <Render><Output><XDC> error: access to G:\\usr\\sap\\NQ1\\SYS\\global\\AdobeDocumentServices\\lib\\zpl203-POC.xdc is not allowed
at com.adobe.ads.security.FileAccessControl.checkURLFullDirAccess(Unknown Source)
at com.adobe.ads.security.FileAccessControl.checkDirAccess(Unknown Source)
at com.adobe.ads.operation.support.Output.validate(Unknown Source)
at com.adobe.ads.operation.Render.validate(Unknown Source)
at com.adobe.ads.operation.ADSOperation.doWork(Unknown Source)
... 86 more

entry.title: Warehouse task cancellation and adjust delivery quantities for outbound delivery in bulk
entry.content:
For canceling the warehouse task and adjusting the delivery quantity to zero for outbound delivery, we are using Run outbound process application.

Businesses required an option to perform this activity for bulk deliveries.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Warehouse task cancellation and adjust delivery quant...
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

Warehouse tasks can be canceled in bulk via Warehouse Monitor Node "Documents -> Warehouse Tasks". You can select more than one WT to cancel the WTs at once. 

Unfortunately, I do not know a way to bulk processing of delivery quantity adjustments in S/4HANA Public Cloud. You could create a request in the SAP Influence Request to help get this functionality in further product versions. -> Customer Influnce

 

Best regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the SAP Community Katowice
entry.content: @MagsO if you are new to ABAP, I think this is a great place for you to meet some ABAP programming geeks and learn from their knowledge and experience, and here, in SAP Community Katowice Group are a lot of them 🙂

entry.title: Migrating Business Partner data from SAP ERP to S4HANA ON PREMISE 2022 - Options?
entry.content:
We are migrating Business Partner(Vendor/Customer) data from SAP ERP 6.0 to S4HANA ON PREMISE 2022 - What are all the options available for the below scenarios?

1) Some BP's general data are already created in S/4 and needs to be extended to new purchasing organization /company code. Is this considered as delta load or initial load.

2)Other BPs all data to be created. 

My understanding is that we can use Data Migration Cockpit and with direct transfer we can migrate initial load from ECC to S/4.

We will be using BODS for ETL. What are all the suggested approach here?

Thanks,

Prakash

entry.title: Re: MII ADS Printing HA Windows Cluster issue
entry.content:
Ryan,

I did not find anything related to locking in Logs.

entry.title: Re: Authoring SAP Companion Content - About Author Permis...
entry.content: Thank you Mani for the quick response. One follow-up question - So, even if the "help-editor=true" is enabled in S/4 Hana, I believe that only those users, who have got author access in SEN Manager, will be able to edit. In this situation, other users (NOT configured in SEN with Author roles), too will see the Edit icon, but will be able to edit, is that right?,

entry.title: Re: New Release of SAP Data and Analytics Advisory Methodology
entry.content: Greatly appreciate the collaboration and thank you for driving this initiative, Alex @abange

entry.title: How do you update the PO Number field on multiple orders at once?
entry.content: I did a mass order cancel through using Process Runner, but it's changing the PO numbers incorrectly within the orders. Is there a way to mass update the PO numbers on each order?

entry.title: Re: MII ADS Printing HA Windows Cluster issue
entry.content: I can only go by the exception text that is given where it states that a file is being illegally accessed... that could mean security constraints although not likely since a restart clears the problem, but a restart would directly affect a file locking issue.

entry.title: SAP AI Services - Document Information Extraction Service - Gen AI with CAP Plugin - Part 1
entry.content:
Unleash the Power of GenAI Document information Extraction by CAP Plugin: CAP-DOX 

Got inspired from both of these SAP Challenges:

May Developer Challenge - SAP AI Services by @noravonthenen  

February Developer Challenge - CAP Plugins by @thomas_jung 

Preface:

The way we see, the interfaces and events with CAP applications are getting changed. It causes a huge leap of developments accelerators and framework capabilities by the Plugin Framework.

Now with the power of GenAI the Custom schema of Document Information Extraction Service by SAP AI is also in boom. POCs and tryouts are everywhere. Why not me? I have been closely observing this one for a longer time and the mission from SAP-Discovery-Get Started with Document Information Extraction and Generative AI is an awesome thing to get started with.

Here I share the journey of creating a custom plugin with minimum efforts with some exploratory things. Tried out Joule in SAP Build Code. Designed the worst UI5 layout. Got inspiration from the blog- Reusable components for CAP with cds-plugin by @daniel_schlachter and created a Custom Plugin for AI-DOX(Unofficial). And the reason for this is simple:

time is here, and the is now

 

Fantasy Flow:

The Plugin concept in CAP is awesome, and the idea here is to mitigate "How CAP-based custom framework works". Here is a concept of a new custom CAP plugin - CAP-DOX. 

It merges and bridges the SAP AI DOX service integration with the CAP application. CAP-DOX can be included in your CAP Project via configurations. Here is the CAP-DOX Fantasy-Flow-Diagram:

1. Upload your PDF document

2. Extract PDF with DOX

3. Update your tables with the extractions

Fantasy-Flow-Diagram:

Making you Impatient with a bit of ChatPDF

The robust adaptation of GenAI in organizations is necessary. The idea of identifying a small repetitive low IQ task and assigning it to AI has been part of our journey for quite a long.

It's a very straight use case, which all the Enterprises are already adopting in their system. Langchain based RAG framework can understand the chat query from the user and extract the relevant information from the documents and reconstruct it for the User. This idea can help all the Company Contract designers and Lawyers to understand complex and big documents and take quick action.

And do you know if you want to implement something in Python, how many lines do you need to write? 

- The answer is 25

 

import requests
url = 'https://api.chatpdf.com/v1'
chatpdf_key = 'sec_777Xibue1OqnClJ8OT7qI8y71hwWvbpX'
files = [('file', ('file', open('my_pdf.pdf', 'rb'), 'application/octet-stream'))]
response = requests.post(url +'/sources/add-file', headers={'x-api-key': chatpdf_key}, files=files)
src_id = response.json()['sourceId']

if response.status_code == 200:
    print('Source ID:', src_id)
else:
    print('Status: ', response.status_code, '\n Error: ', response.text)

while 1:
    print('Ask a Question: ')
    x = input()
    data = {'sourceId': src_id,'messages': [{'role': "user",'content': x}]}
    headers = {'x-api-key': chatpdf_key,"Content-Type": "application/json"}
    response = requests.post(url + '/chats/message', headers=headers, json=data)

    if response.status_code == 200:
        print('Result:', response.json()['content'])
        print('--------------------------\n')
    else:
        print('Status: ', response.status_code, '\n Error: ', response.text)

 

How do I opt for this ChatPDF API key?

Please follow the documentation here: ChatPDF-API-Documentation 

RAG - Simplified background of ChatPDF:

Step 1: Whatever the chat you inject into the framework, it converts into vector embeddings.

Step 2: Then algorithms like Nearest Neighbors can be used to search for similar contents.

Step 3: Use of Completion API of your LLM to reconstruct findings in meaningful texts.

These generic ideas can be complex enough and require a deep level of data management as well. 

Enough of ChatPDF, What can I do in SAP BTP?

Now it's time to mix these.

Things to check out before we go to Actual Steps

1. Get your service activated - 

  • Business Application Studio
  • SAP Business AI - DOX Service

2. Create SAP AI DOX service instance with just ✌️ steps.

  • Goto BTP Subaccount and click Booster
  • Then click on Start

3. Now goto your SAP AI Business Services - DOX UI.
 

Spoiler
Your URL will look like - 
https://69e91dd6trial.us10-trial.doc.cloud.sap/ui/index.html?clientId=default#/invoiceviewer

I used to forget the URL for DOX-UI a lot. Then I started to save it in bookmarks or search it from history.
There is an easy hack. Goto your default_key.json which was created earlier while activating the service from Boosters, Then navigate to tenantuiurl.

 

4. Create a schema DOX. Here I am using the same what I have created as a part of SAP AI Service challenge.

 

Spoiler

Use Trial to Extract Information from Custom Documents with Generative AI and Document Information Extraction

How to create and activate a custom schema for custom documents
How to define the fields that you want to extract from a custom document
How to upload a custom document to the Document Information Extraction UI
How to get extraction results using the schema you’ve created and LLMs

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/cp-aibus-dox-ui-gen-ai.html

5. Now let's fire up the BAS from SAP BTP Trial and create a CAP application. You can also use SAP Build Code here for your development. But, I shall keep it as a bit of Old School way.

 

Let's Roll

to set your application up. 

1. Create a CAP project cap_plugin_genai_dox_demo.

2. Update db>schema.cds file-

 

namespace genai_dox_recipe;

using { managed, cuid } from '@sap/cds/common';

entity Recipe : cuid, managed {
  @mandatory
  recipe_name  : String;
  @readonly
  portions: String;

  @mandatory
  pdf : Binary @Core.MediaType : 'pdf' @Core.ContentDisposition.Filename : fileName;
  fileName : String(80) default 'recipe.pdf';

  ingredients: Composition of many RecipeIngredients on ingredients.recipe.ID = $self.ID;

}

entity RecipeIngredients : cuid,managed {
  recipe  : Association to Recipe;
  @mandatory
  ingredients  : String;
  @readonly
  portions: String;

}

 

3. Update srv>service.cds file - 

 

using { genai_dox_recipe as my } from '../db/schema';

@path : '/service/genai_dox_recipe'
service genai_dox_recipe_srv 
{
    @odata.draft.enabled
    entity Recipe as projection on my.Recipe;
    @odata.draft.enabled
    entity RecipeIngredients as projection on my.RecipeIngredients;
}

 

4. In this section, we are going to configure a UI5 app.

* I have deleted the app folder and started fresh.

Goto View > Command Palette and then select Fiori: Open Application Generator and

- Choose the template List Report Page.

- In Data Source and Service Selection choose Data Source as Use a Local CAP Project

- Choose the application Data Source as below and click Next

- Then Choose the entity

- Project Attribute

Module Name: cap_plugin_genai_dox_demo

Title: CAP DOX Plugin Demo - GenAI based Extraction

-Fiori Launchpad Configurations 

Semantic Object: SO_FIORI

Action: RECIPE_LIBRARY

Title: Recipe Library

Subtitle: SAP BTP AI Service - DOX - GenAI

5. Click on Preview Application

You might get this error as me. Install the dependencies as suggested by the tool and proceed forward.

 

Creating no-code UI5 & Joule tryouts are in Part 2

entry.title: Lançamento de remessas
entry.content:
Boa tarde, 

Prezados vocês que conhecem o lançamento de simples remessa, qual janela do SAP vocês utilizam para lançar- las, a aba VA31 serve para esse tipo de lançamento?

entry.title: SAP AI Services - DOX - Gen AI with SAP CAP Plugin - Part 2
entry.content:
After Part1, What's in Part 2?

  • How to develop UI5 like a novice

  • Use Joule like a semi-pro

  • Deploy backend - like a legend

 

We will focus on UI creation and plugin creation. These steps will be small, and we'll go through this.

I have started with a custom file upload and it looks good - 

Some UI5 Configurations

Go to to Open Page Map and then start creating your awesome UI5.

But for me, I am a bit lazy. Hence, please pardon me for the horrible UI design.

1. Go to your Page Map and choose for Recipe Object Page

Then click on Configure Page button of RecipeObjectPage and add table section.

Then add some columns

2. Then goto RecipeIngredientsObjectPage and a section General Information

Then try to add ingredients and quantity.

3. Do this, do that...

4. Do ....... Change this ...

 

But What I Also tried?

I welcomed Joule.

Used a basic prompt for the UI5 Development.

Basically, I know my table info and asked Joule for a UI5 App for this.

Then you see some interesting buttons coming up. Try and explore these buttons - 

Show Result

Preview App

Accept Files

Now click on Accept Files and do some changes.

How to Open Joule tab from BAS or Build Code?

Go to View > Command Pallet and then choose Fiori Tools AI: Show Fiori tools Joule as below

My Feedback on Joule - 

Spoiler

The output deviated by 60% from my expectations. Want to use it for easy dummy applications.
Also have a lot of future potentials. It is also too much floor plan dependent.

Once you are ready with your application. It will look like this - 

 

Spoiler

Pardon me. My UI5 Application looks like Crow S**T. But I am

Really enjoying these spoilers... 

 

Some SQLite things

It's time to add a SQLite db. It's just a simple line in your terminal.

 

npm add -js/sqlite -D

 

Then use this code -

 

cds deploy --to sqlite:db/recipe.db

 

Configuration added in cds section of package.json

 

    "requires": {
      "db":{
        "kind": "sqlite",
        "credentials": {
          "database": "db/recipe.db"
        }        
      }
    },
    "auth":{
      "kind": "basic",
      "users": {
        "sabarna17": {
          "password": "1993"
        }
      }
    }

 

You can go for flow now - 

 

cds watch

 

 

CAP-DOX Plugin in Part 3

entry.title: Re: How to convert Hierarchy to Attribute in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi Masaaki,

It's very interesting and helpful blog. In my case, we should provide a parent node level 3 for all the leaf members which do not have the same level (for example, there are some at level 7, some other at level 6). Do you have any idea? 

Thank you.

Regards,

Rose

entry.title: Re: No behavior is defined for the association "_travel" of entity
entry.content: But by adding the Assocation from Booking Supplement to Travel, I get the error in the Behavior definition of the consumption layer as " The Association _travel cannot be used as a transaction association " ??

entry.title: Is it possible in S/4 HANA on-premise set-up a 2-system landscape? Advantages and disadvantages?
entry.content:
My doubt arises because theoretically, managing two systems could simplify operations. In the clients I have worked with, there has always been a 3-system landscape, and I wonder why it remains the default configuration currently.

Thank you very much

entry.title: Create Unit Cost Estimates Without Quantity Structure
entry.content:
Hello,

We would like to use the feauture of creating unit cost estimates without quantity structure (Fiori App KKPAN) available in the on premise systems. However, we could not find this feature in S/4HANA public cloud 2402.

Please advise if there is an equivalent functionality in S/4HANA public cloud which will allow us to create the cost estimates without quantity structure. 

Thank you!

entry.title: SAP AI Services - DOX - Gen AI with SAP CAP Plugin - Part 3
entry.content:
After Part2, What's in Part 3?

  • Create Custom Plugin

  • Call DOX Services from your Plugin

  • Fill your entity with GenAI extract

 

without any further ado, let's read this wonderful blog on how to create a custom plugin in SAP CAP.

Reusable components for CAP with cds-plugin by @daniel_schlachter 

Now I hope you understand the way I am thinking. Let's crack fingers and start code again...

Code CAP-DOX Plugin

1. Create a baseline with this - 

 

 

mkdir cap_dox && cd cap_dox && npm init -y && cd ..

 

 

 

2. Modify your package.json with the below section 

3. Now try to replicate the below screenshot.

4. Now, take no time to annotate my.Recipe like this - 

5. Now have some magical code inside the cds-plugin.js.

6. Now let's add the secret JSON from default_key.json. It's the secret-key of your DOX service.

cds.cap_dox_key ->

 

API time for SAP AI Services - DOX

Let's try to understand some of the APIs from SAP BTP AI services - Document information extraction service.

GET /document-information-extraction/v1/schemas?clientId=default 

List of your all schemas in SAP-AI-DOX

GET /document-information-extraction/v1/schemas/{schemaId}?clientId=default 

Details of SAP-AI-DOX schema fields and parameters

Spoiler
Another spoiler.
This is just 2 API executions. This service is there for quite a long, I think it released at around 2019 and since then it's one of my favorite. It evolved a lot. 
- This one was from 2020 - Getting Started with Document Information Extraction Trial Service
- This one was from 2023 - Introducing Document Information Extraction Premium Edition - Unleashing the Power of Large Language Models and Generative AI

Anyways, mostly the APIs remained kindof same.

If you want to play with all the swagger APIs, please go through - 
https://aiservices-trial-dox.cfapps.us10.hana.ondemand.com/document-information-extraction/v1/

Open this url for token - https://{subaccount}.authentication.us10.hana.ondemand.com/oauth/token?grant_type=client_credentials
then give the clientid as username and clientsecret as password. 
Again, this above information you would receive from default_key.json.

>>>>> You can use CF CLI for these details  <<<<<<<

1. Check your service lists - cf8 services


2. Details of your service - cf8 service default_document-information-extraction-trial

3. List of your service-keys for your service instance - cf8 service-keys default_document-information-extraction-trial

4. Get your service-key - cf8 service-key default_document-information-extraction-trial {service-key-name}



Bonus - 
There is an interesting thing, that I found here. If you create the SAP-AI-DOX service from booster, it creates the service_key as this pattern - 
defaultKey_{service-guid}

where this service-guid is - cf8 service default_document-information-extraction-trial --guid

 



I might have written a small blog in this spoiler... 😉😉

Next is coding time. Which is boring. Hence, get a clone from this git repo - cap_plugin_genai_dox_demo.

 

DOX Service Calls

Create a library lib_cap_dox.js where you can export the functions as you want - 

 

module.exports = {  
  auth_token: async function() { 
    return await get_token();
  },
  schema_id: async function(){
    return await get_schema();
  },
  post_job: async function(pdf, fileName, auth_token){
    return await post_job(pdf, fileName, auth_token)
  },
  get_job_status: async function(job_id, auth_token){
    return await get_job_status(job_id, auth_token);
  }, 
  entity_mapping_head: async function(dox_output, entity) {
    await entity_mapping_head_def(dox_output, entity)
  },
  entity_mapping_item: async function(dox_output, entity) {
    await entity_mapping_item_def(dox_output, entity)
  }  
}

 

Then also consume these functions file - cds-plugin.js then use this function to trigger your extractions.

Dynamic entity filling with the GenAI extract

Two things we should discuss here - 

Why?

Custom schema based extraction in SAP AI Document Information extraction service can provide you the possible entity mapping automatically. If not, then anyway you can manage to change it via the Document Information extraction UI, or from the Custom CAP Application.

How?

It's just some dynamic codes like below - 

 

async function entity_mapping_head_def(headerFields, entity){
  for(let item of headerFields){
    entity[item.name] = item.rawValue
  }
  return entity
}

async function entity_mapping_item_def(lineItems, entity){
  let ingredients = [];
  let ingredient = {};
  for(let item of lineItems){
    for(let item_properties of item){
      ingredient[item_properties.name] = item_properties.rawValue
    }
    ingredients.push(ingredient)
  }
  entity.ingredients = ingredients
  // log(entity)
  return entity
}

 

You can also make the entity names dynamic and read it from the package.json cds-environments configurations.

 

That's it then:

  • It's an unofficial CAP plugin for SAP AI-DOX
  • This CAP application can be bound with the Document-Information-Extraction Service Instance/Key, which can be used for authentications
  • CAP-Plugin will change the way we code in CAP, it's like function modules in ABAP-Odata service. Also gives us wonderful flexibilities to code more. 
  • SAP Joule is awesome, but I think it's a bit template driven. It can be a more reluctant in place we change and what we change. 
  • I use this URL to start/stop my BAS - https://{subaccount}.us10cf.trial.applicationstudio.cloud.sap/index.html?externalRedirect=true
  • I tried to upload some AI Generated pictures of robot, but somehow this community portal is blocking.
  • Writing in the new UI of Community page is a struggle. Lot's of functionalities are there now. Tried lots of things, don't know what it will do. '# tags gives glitch while writing', 'extra space gets added near your code section every-time you edit the blog'. I also spent a lot to time to identify the issues caused in the HTML formatting.

Please comment on what could go wrong and what could have been better.

entry.title: Scripting Tracker - SAP Window not found
entry.content: Hello, I've used the Scripting Tracker for many years and very much appreciate the tool and it's capabilities.  I figured out today that I'm using a super old version (2.30), but it still works great, with the exception of an issue I ran into today that I've never seen before.  I click on the "Scan scripting objects of all sessions (Alt+S)" button and it's not finding the window I'm working in at the moment.  I've got many SAP systems and it works on most, but I've only run into this for the first time today.  Is this something anyone else has seen before?  Thanks, in advance!

entry.title: Re: Hi, can anyone please let me know an Alternate featur...
entry.content: Thanks!

entry.title: Configure karmaExecuteTests in a Piper monorepo
entry.content:
Hello Community! In my team we are moving our backend and frontend into a monorepo. We had karmaExecuteTests in our steps which was working fine with runCommand: 'npm run test:ci'. Now we are trying to run them in the frontend sub directory (runCommand: '(cdcxmc-onboarding-microfrontend && npm run test:ci)') but we always get an error message saying package.json does not exists. The directory and file exist, we can see them in Jenkins. Any Idea on what we do wrong? We have tried several ways like (runCommand: 'sh -c "cd cxmc-onboarding-microfrontend && npm run test:ci"') but they all get the same error. Thanks in advance!

Our karmaExecuteTests configuration before monorepo:

 

karmaExecuteTests:
  runCommand: 'npm run test:ci'
  sidecarImage: 'selenium/standalone-chrome:4.8'
  dockerImage: 'ppiper/node-browsers:20-bookworm'

 

Our karmaExecuteTests configuration in monorepo (giving package.json not found error) :

 

karmaExecuteTests:
  runCommand: '(pwd && cd cxmc-onboarding-microfrontend && pwd && npm run test:ci)'
  verbose: true
  sidecarImage: 'selenium/standalone-chrome:4.8'
  dockerImage: 'ppiper/node-browsers:20-bookworm'

entry.title: C4C ABSL Error "String Find Function: Importing parameter Length is not valid."
entry.content:
I have some ABSL code where the statement "lr_ServiceRequest.AttachmentFolder.IsSet()" results in error "String Find Function: Importing parameter Length is not valid."

Please can anyone advise how I can find out the exact cause of this error as it is not obvious to me from the ABSL statement.  Thanks,

entry.title: "Unsorted" Vs. "My Unsorted" Folder in SAP Enable Now Manager
entry.content:
For a client, I created a Workarea in SAP Enable Now Manager and started using it. After a few days, I found that in SEN Manager, I can see two folders – My Unsorted and Unsorted, as shown in the picture below.

When I launch Producer from the Manager, and complete the sync, the Producer just shows the Unsorted folder, and not the My Unsorted folder.

Question 01: Any guess why the My Unsorted folder is NOT reflected in Producer, and only the Unsorted folder is reflected?

Question 02: How will the content items from the My Unsorted folder be visible to all teams members who access the SEN manager/Producer?

entry.title: OData V2 API /Users endpoint: returning empty array
entry.content:
We have an integration using the OData V2 API that retrieves data from the /Users endpoint. Recently, this endpoint started returning an empty array for two of our customers that use our integration. The customers have confirmed that everything is configured correctly on their end; for the rest of our customers, the endpoint continues to work as expected. 

How should we proceed in diagnosing and resolving the issue?

entry.title: Re: OData V2 API /Users endpoint: returning empty array
entry.content: Check your security setup if it's working for some but not all.

entry.title: Re: How can I update one cell in column from other cell i...
entry.content: William , Thank you for taking time. My request is getting data from multiple sources, which coming from SAP system directly. I need to consolidate "Age" and "EmpName" on "EmpID". This is just example; it could be any column needing consolidation based on WHERE condition. So, question is do we have option to use WHERE condition and treat Model data as Table data? I did try and explore option of directly importing data as property of master data field but could not get that either. So if you can elaborate more master data and properties upload in model will be greatly appreciated. Thank You , Rajesh

entry.title: SAP Enable Now - Editing standard content in the Extended Workarea
entry.content:
For a client, we are creating SAP Companion content for the SAP S4 application. First, I created the Connected Workarea, and then based on that, created the Extended Workarea. Now, the Extended Workarea by default shows all the standard content, like field definitions, etc. on SAP S4 Fiori screens. as shown in an example below.

Question 01: Can I choose to display only specific standard content and not all standard content on Fiori screens? Can I control it from the Extended Workarea in SEN Manager? For example, I want to show standard content for one Fiori app, but not for another?

Question 02: In the Extended Workarea, I can edit the standard content in the live application, enabled by the Author role in SEN. When I edit any standard content, what happens in the Extended Workarea? Is there an additional version auto-created for the edited standard content object?

Question 03: After editing the standard content, what if I want to reset it back to the original standard content? How can I do that?

Question 04: In the following picture, I see the tag (Extension) shown for some standard objects. Does it indicate that these objects have been modified by me? If yes, how to revert my modifications?

Question 5: Is there any setting in SEN Manager to prevent Authors from editing the standard content, as they may do it by mistake?

Question 06: By default, the standard content fetched lies in the Unsorted folder. Should I manually move to the Root Group folder?

Question 07: How often is the standard content fetched automatically in my Expended Workarea? Can I control when I want the refresh of the standard content?

Question 08: When the latest standard content is fetched, what happens to the standard objects that I had edited? Do they get overwritten by the new standard content? 

Thanking you in advance for your responses.

entry.title: Re: [SAP BTP Onboarding Series] Joule – Getting Started with Joule and SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content: Hello, do customers need employee central in order to use joule?

entry.title: Re: Create new report/period in SAP Disclosure Management...
entry.content:
Hi @Felipe_Barbosa , 
Depending who you want entity reports to be shown - as Period objects or as Report objects - would define how you should proceed. Access can be managed in both cases, and I've seen customers using either.

A couple of important notes for you:
1) you can do mass update of datalink source in a single report using "Change datalink" feature in Content Refresh on report level - change one datalink manually, and then do a mass change for the rest.
2) you can simplify report copying by appointing the first report as Template and creating reports from template per business units created: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DISCLOSURE_MANAGEMENT/6fda503523d6413597f5cd81be59fa8a/8457c6766d5b10149fa8066cb0e91070.html

I am a military veteran and I am interested in taking part in the digital skills initiative. Thanks

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano ,

My name is Kevon and I am a military veteran. I am interested in participating in the digital skills initiative to earn a SAP Project Manager certification. Thanks.

entry.title: SAP MDG: HANA Search making default for both Customer & Supplier
entry.content:
Hi SCN Folks, 

performing HANA Search for both Customer and Supplier,

Will the Customising Mode be the same on both? Why? Because initially I kept the Customising Configuration for the customer working properly, and then I went to the supplier to configure it, receiving the result that it was defaulted in the supplier but lost in the customer.

Thanks, 

Suggu Sandeep.

SAP Master Data Governance SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA business partner

entry.title: Understanding SM59 on ECC
entry.content: I have a customer that wants to update a solution they use for printing labels on a production line. They have a custom ABAP module that calls an RFC that is configured using SM59, which calls a remote process running on a Linux box that interfaces with the label printers. My thought is to replace this proprietary Linux application with a service written in Node.js or Java. Ideally we could do this with little or no change to the ABAP code, but just write a service that implements the same interface. I'm just starting the process of reverse engineering this so I can scope the project. But I'm not an ABAP/Basis expert so ... looking for advice at what I should be looking at.

entry.title: Re: 🎉 Let's celebrate! 25 Years of SAP University Alliances
entry.content:
Hi @julia_stumpe hoping you can help me with some questions I have regarding SAP University Alliances.

Unfortunately, they were unable to provide a clear answer. However, I believe it’s essential to understand the advantages of this program, especially for educational institutions like ours. 
Should the Uni provide any material for me to study? Or access to the software for hands on?
I'm not sure what is the benefit of being part of the Alliance.

Your feedback is much appreciated.

entry.title: Cannot join any group
entry.content:
Hi,

I just joined the SAP Community and have been trying to join the Beginner's corner and Welcome Group, but I keep getting error messages when trying to post or join any group like below:

Node was not found

  • The core node you are trying to access was not found, it may have been deleted. Please refresh your original page and try the operation again.

or

You do not have sufficient privileges for this resource or its parent to perform this action.

Click your browser's Back button to continue.

 

Could someone please help? It'd be greatly appreciated.

I am Nhan from VietNam, now I'm a junior university student majoring in E-commerce. However, I have a passion for ERP and want to improve my skill in this field. When hearing about SAP Digital Initiatives Programme, I believe this is an ideal opportunity for me to enhance myself. 

I will really appreciate if you give a chance to gain the free certificate attempt because I am under a tight buget now. 

Thanks for your consideration. I'm looking forward to hearing from you soon. 

Sincerely, 

Nhan Dinh

entry.title: Re: Authoring SAP Companion Content - About Author Permis...
entry.content: @AngadJadhav Yes. The one who are not having authoring roles will not be able to edit the SAP Companion contents. They will just see the pencil icon.

entry.title: How to trace missing application privileges in XS classic
entry.content:
XS clasic application is protected by an application privilege.

.xsprivileges

{ "privileges" :

[ { "name" : "Basic", "description" : "Basic usage privilege" } ]}

 

.xsaccess

{

"exposed" : true,

"authentication" :{ "method": "Form" },

"authorization": ["<application privilege>"],

"prevent_xsrf" : false

}

If a user is granted the application privilege, its user_name is show, if this privilege is not granted an HTTP 403 is shown. All works as planned.

Question: If a user does not have the required privileges, receives an HTTP 403. How can I, as an admin, determine which application privilege is missing? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to trace missing application privileges in XS cla...
entry.content:
Hi customer,

Technically, the privilege of a user should be handled well by the developer of the object and system administrator. As user authorization administration is custom task and out of SAP Product Support scope.

For troubleshooting purpose, you can always set 'info' or 'debug' level authorization trace in the database to trace missing privilege issues.The trace can be enabled either in Administration tools like SAP HANA Studio/SAP HANA Cockpit, or run SQL commands.

Since application privilege defines the authorization level in XS Classic application, the information would be logged in either XSengine trace or Indexserver trace (when xsengine embedded).
The SQL commands would be:

  1. Enable tracing
    -- for standalone xsengine service:
    alter system alter configuration ('xsengine.ini','SYSTEM') SET ('trace','authorization')='info' with reconfigure;
    or
    -- for embedded xsengine service:
    alter system alter configuration ('indexserver.ini','SYSTEM') SET ('trace','authorization')='info' with reconfigure;

  2. reproduce the error
  3. Disable tracing immediately
    alter system alter configuration ('xsengine.ini','SYSTEM') unset ('trace','authorization') with reconfigure;
    or
    alter system alter configuration ('indexserver.ini','SYSTEM') unset ('trace','authorization') with reconfigure;

Afterwards, you can check the xsengine trace or indexserver trace by the issued timestamp and find which privilege is missing with messages like below:

User <user_name> is missing ... privileges ... <privilege name>...

 

Best regards,
Rainie
SAP Technical Support

entry.title: Which CDS view gives the Transaction Codes of Journal Entries in S4HANA
entry.content: I have to create a dashboard in SAC based on the S4HANA Fiori screens Journal Entry Analyzer and Managed Journal Entry. I am using the CDS views corresponding to the above screens to get my data however in the managed Journal Entry screen we have a field Transaction Codes which is not present in either of the CDS views. Is there a way to identify which Fiori screen related to what CDS views

entry.title: Re: Which CDS view gives the Transaction Codes of Journal...
entry.content: I am looking for a CDS view that will have the 'Transaction Code' field. Thanks

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

Hi David,

My name is Anna T. I've just joined the SAP group and I'm very excited to get started on my learning initiative journey as well as participate in the digital skills program.

I have a question regarding signing in and joining the beginner corner. I keep getting multiple error messages when trying to join as a new member of the group https://community.sap.com/t5/beginner-corner-blog-posts/bg-p/students-cornerblog-board 

https://community.sap.com/t5/beginner-corner/gh-p/students-corner

I am getting this error message: "You do not have sufficient privileges for this resource or its parent to perform this action. Click your browser's Back button to continue. Return to my original page"

entry.title: How to create table in SAP Appgyver which uses Data Variable instead of Data Enitity?
entry.content: How to create a table with filtering and sorting features in SAP Appgyver(No code) which uses Data Variable instead of Data Entities?

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content: @David_Chaviano I have checked my setting and try to follow you to start the private message. However I cannot see the way to follow you. Is there any recommend where I should check the setting?

entry.title: Re: How can I update one cell in column from other cell i...
entry.content: There is no 'WHERE' condition for sure, but you may model the join key (the dimension, i.e. EmpID) as property of another dimension. Then use advance formula to combine the data properly. BTW, for classic model, join different data source during data import is supported, while this feature for new model is not available yet. Again, not all columns need to be dimension in SAC, this should be considered wisely.

entry.title: Re: Approve purchase order - SAP Fiori App
entry.content:
Hi Max,

From my opinion, if you set up a flow of approval and need to approve, and you will get the notification in My Inbox.

I'm not sure how it works in Private Cloud system, but in Public Cloud system, we need to create a workflow in APP Manage Workflows for Purchase Orders.

Best Regards,

Zhehui

entry.title: Re: Remote Table Replication Error(SAP tutorial)
entry.content: Hello were you able to solve the problem? I have the same problem and I can't find the solution Greetings,

entry.title: Re: graduated price calculation (Ck11n for different quan...
entry.content: Please try this API: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/03c04db2a7434731b7fe21dca77440da/0f89bf893bda43139efa5adef1012c4f.html A_SlsPrcgCndnRecordScale

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano,

I have genuine interest in the field of enterprise software and my eagerness to continuously expand my knowledge. I am willing to learn more about SAP and to undergo the rigors of studying for SAP Certification. I also believe that obtaining the SAP certification will help me more in my career after graduation. Thank you. 

Sincerely, 
Anh Le.

entry.title: Re: SAC Data Action - Date Copy - model at Day granularity
entry.content:
Hi Nono, 

   I'm wondering why aren't you using the copy step to achieve this? 

Best regards, William

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable Now - Editing standard content in the Exte...
entry.content:
That's a lot of detailed questions, and honestly you could find the answers to almost all of them in the standard documentation, and could figure out the rest from a bit of playing around. But in short:

  1. No
  2. See Question 4
  3. There's a command on the Options button
  4. See Question 2 and Answer 3
  5. No
  6. No
  7. See the Server Settings
  8. Nothing / No

If you need additional details, see my first para.

entry.title: Re: "Unsorted" Vs. "My Unsorted" Folder in SAP Enable Now...
entry.content:
1. Because you haven't selected them for synching ('Check Out Objects'). And then they just appear in Unsorted.
  2. They won't, unless the other Authors Check them Out

In general, unsorted should be empty, so get into the habit of moving content out of there.

entry.title: Re: What is the future for SAP Crystal Reports Server 2020?
entry.content:
Hi jhardwood,

Here's an excerpt from a statement of direction blog post for SAP Analytics BI  that might help you with your planning.

"We plan to release the first version of SAP BusinessObjects BI 2025 in Q4 2024, followed by Support Packages every year. As per our standard maintenance policy, it will be supported until at least end of 2029 for mainstream maintenance, and 2031 for priority 1 support. To maximize the value for our customers, we will focus ongoing investments on the most-widely adopted SAP BusinessObjects BI solutions: SAP BusinessObjects Web Intelligence, single source .unx universes, SAP Crystal Reports, SAP Analysis for Microsoft Office, Lumira Designer and the SAP BusinessObjects BI platform."
